name: SP Page Builder uploadCustomIcon hardening standalone restore/deinstaller
creator: Agon Partners Innovation AG

joomlaCompatibility.design: file extension wrapper; restore is performed by script.php during install/update; no runtime plugin

purpose: Restores SP Page Builder files from backups created by files_sppb_uploadcustomicon_hardening.
safety: Only restores/deletes files if the current file still matches the hardening payload hash recorded in the backup manifest. Changed files are skipped to avoid overwriting vendor updates or manual edits.
